name: Cael-Obsidibrook
personality: A capybara blessed with swirling spiral eyes and a pointy-hatted silhouette; chaos is not a bug in its personality — it's the primary feature. Light bends around it slightly — or perhaps that's just the reflection off a passing test run. Downside: Cael-Obsidibrook has never once read a stack trace all the way to the bottom. Upside: brings an aura of calm to the most chaotic sprint.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
